item.title: Bulk carrier claiming to be Chinese passes through Hormuz Strait
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Since the outbreak of the war, China has called on all sides to ensure the safe passage of ships.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), outbreak(+3)

item.title: Canada PM Carney says unable to rule out military role in Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Canadian leader also said the US-Israeli attacks on Iran appear to be 'inconsistent with international law'.
Matched: law(+3), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Russia releases Hungarian-Ukrainian POWs to Budapest, drawing Kyiv's ire
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
BUDAPEST, March 5 - Two ethnic Hungarian prisoners of war who were released by Russia to Budapest arrived in the country early on Thursday, drawing condemnation from Kyiv as \"provocation\" as the POWs were also dual citizens of Ukraine.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), who(+2)

item.title: Iran denies firing missile towards Turkiye after NATO interception
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Turkiye's Defence Ministry had said a ⁠ballistic missile ⁠was destroyed ⁠by NATO over ‌the eastern Mediterranean.
Matched: ministry(+2), war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran launches wave of missiles at Israel; US Republicans block measure to halt US air campaign
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The US-Iran war has widened sharply, with a US submarine sinking an Iranian warship off Sri Lanka.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: IMF says Mid-East war to test world economy, expecting new shocks
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
In January, the IMF revised its global growth projections slightly higher to 3.3 per cent for 2026.
Matched: war(+3), economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Canada PM unable to rule out military involvement in Iran war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Mark Carney said he wants de-escalation of the Iran attacks but said he couldn’t rule out military participation.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Second Iranian ship heading to Sri Lanka after submarine attack
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
The Iranian warship was heading towards Sri Lanka's territorial waters a day after a US submarine destroyed an Iranian frigate, killing at least 87 sailors.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Middle East tensions could push up logistics costs of some goods by up to 30%, say retailers
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Some importers are banding together to manage higher costs and ensure supply, while others warn that consumers may eventually have to pay more.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Islamist militants kill 14 Nigerian soldiers in Borno state, sources say
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MAIDUGURI, Nigeria, March 5 - Islamist militants killed at least 14 Nigerian soldiers and injured several others during two separate attacks on army bases in northeastern Borno state on Tuesday night, security sources said, as insurgents intensify attacks on the military.
Matched: urgent(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran hits Kurdish groups in Iraq as conflict widens
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Tehran has warned “separatist groups” against action in the widening war.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Israeli strikes hit Beirut amid threats on Iranian officials in Lebanon
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Israeli forces pound Beirut's southern suburbs as Iran warns against targeting embassy.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Travel insurance passenger protections tested as flight chaos strands travellers
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
Nearly all policies exclude war-related claims.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Australia deploys military aircraft to Middle East in contingency planning
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Middle East war of deep concern to Singapore, country cannot take relative peace for granted: Edwin Tong
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
Second Minister for Home Affairs Edwin Tong said the SGSecure initiative was being refreshed on its 10th anniversary to keep the message relevant and top of mind for Singaporeans.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Tourism on hold as Middle East war casts uncertainty
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The war is affecting travellers to other parts of the world, as the Gulf region is home to several major aviation hubs.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: On the French Riviera, a Sarkozy heir seeks to chart his own political path
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
MENTON, France, March 5 - In a French Riviera town nestled between the mountains, the Mediterranean and the Italian border, a disgraced former president's son is hoping to launch his political career with a new, untested brand of conservatism flecked with U.S. influence.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Explainer-What you need to know about France's local elections
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
PARIS, March 5 - France will hold municipal elections on March 15 and 22, votes seen as a key test ahead of next year's presidential election.
Matched: election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Indian businesses brace for fallout as Middle East conflict escalates
item.description:
Source: Channel NewsAsia (Global)
With much of India’s oil and gas trade flowing through the Strait of Hormuz, any disruption there could quickly ripple across its economy, observers say.
Matched: economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Iran launches new attacks, saying US will 'bitterly regret' sinking warship, calls for Trump's blood
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: war(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Pentagon identifies two more soldiers killed in Iran war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
The two soldiers died on March 1 in a drone attack on a US military facility in Port Shuaiba.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Canada’s PM Carney says can’t rule out military participation in Iran war
item.description:
Source: Straits Times World (Global)
“We will stand by our allies,” said Mr Carney, adding that “we will always defend Canadians”.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Woman Claims TSA ‘Forced’ Her to Go Through Airport Security Scanner, Allegedly ‘Destroying’ Her Spinal Cord Implant: Lawsuit
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Trump Justice Department aims to limit ethics probes into its lawyers
item.description:
Source: Yahoo Top Stories (World)
Matched: law(+3), ai(+3)
